description_long: This is a low-top, lace-up sneaker with a minimalist design, featuring a smooth, unadorned white upper and a matching white rubber sole. The shoe has a rounded toe, standard eyelets for laces, and subtle stitching details along the sides and around the heel. The collar is lightly padded for comfort, and the tongue is also plain and unbranded. The laces are flat and white, matching the overall monochromatic aesthetic. The interior appears to be lined with a light material, likely fabric or synthetic, for added comfort. There are no visible logos or brand markings on any side of the shoe.
description: A minimalist, all-white low-top sneaker with a smooth upper, flat laces, and a plain rubber sole. The shoe is unbranded and features subtle stitching and a clean, modern look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, flat laces, and plain tongue, emphasizing the shoe's symmetry and clean design.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth upper, subtle stitching, and the low-profile sole, with the laces draping slightly over the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded heel collar and heel seam, with no visible branding or embellishments.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same smooth upper, stitching, and sole, with the laces visible on top.
